data.raceComments: {"comment":"10. BASSETT BABE scored a win two runs back at Morphettville Parks before finishing third last time over 1200m in the Group 3 Don Casboult Classic (Typhoon Tracy Stakes) at Caulfield. Drawn to enjoy a soft run on the speed and on best form should be fighting out the finish. 1. TYCOON STAR ran a solid race over this distance when resuming from a spell last start, racing on the speed and fighting on strongly to finish a nose second of nine in the LR VRC Sprint Classic (Moomba Plate) at Flemington. He won second-up last prep and fitter is a main danger. 6. MATHEMATICIAN scored last start at this track to make it two wins from two starts this prep. Has won a recent six-runner trial over 800m at Morphettville Parks and can make it a hat-trick. 8. SIGNATURE SCENT comes here following a long neck win over 1050m at this track last start. Races well over today's distance and is in the mix.","runners":[10,1,6,8],"exclusive":true}
